name: attmap

metadata.name: attmap
metadata.summary: Multiple access patterns for key-value reference

documentation:
# attmap

[![Build Status](https://travis-ci.org/pepkit/attmap.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/pepkit/attmap)
[![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/repos/github/pepkit/attmap/badge.svg?branch=master)](https://coveralls.io/github/pepkit/attmap?branch=master)

Key-value Mapping supporting nesting and attribute-style access

Originally motivated by and designed for the [pepkit family projects](https://pepkit.github.io/).

modules.name: attmap.helpers
documentation: Ancillary functions

functions.name: attmap.helpers.get_data_lines
documentation:
Get text representation lines for a mapping's data.

:param Mapping data: collection of data for which to get repr lines
:param function(object, prefix) -> str fun_key: function to render key
    as text
:param function(object, prefix) -> str fun_val: function to render value
    as text
:param int space_per_level: number of spaces per level of nesting
:return Iterable[str]: collection of lines

functions.name: attmap.helpers.get_logger
documentation:
Return a logger equipped with a null handler.

:param str name: name for the Logger
:return logging.Logger: simple Logger instance with a NullHandler

functions.name: attmap.helpers.is_custom_map
documentation:
Determine whether an object is a Mapping other than dict.

:param object obj: object to examine
:return bool: whether the object is a Mapping other than dict

functions.name: attmap.helpers.safedel_message
documentation:
Create safe deletion log message.

:param hashable key: unmapped key for which deletion/removal was tried
:return str: message to log unmapped key deletion attempt.

modules.name: attmap.ordattmap
documentation: Ordered attmap

classes.name: attmap.ordattmap.OrdAttMap

methods.name: attmap.ordattmap.OrdAttMap.__getitem__
documentation:
Attempt ordinary access, then access to attributes.

:param hashable item: key/attr for which to fetch value
:return object: value to which given key maps, perhaps modifed
    according to the instance's finalization of retrieved values

methods.name: attmap.ordattmap.OrdAttMap.__setitem__
documentation: Support hook for value transformation before storage.

methods.name: attmap.ordattmap.OrdAttMap.__delitem__
documentation: Make unmapped key deletion unexceptional.

methods.name: attmap.ordattmap.OrdAttMap.__eq__
documentation: Leverage base AttMap eq check, and check key order.

methods.name: attmap.ordattmap.OrdAttMap.__repr__
documentation: Leverage base AttMap text representation.

methods.name: attmap.ordattmap.OrdAttMap._is_od_member
documentation: Assess whether name appears to be a protected OrderedDict member.

methods.name: attmap.ordattmap.OrdAttMap._new_empty_basic_map
documentation: For ordered maps, OrderedDict is the basic building block.

methods.name: attmap.ordattmap.OrdAttMap._lower_type_bound
documentation: OrdAttMap is the type to which nested maps are converted.
Insertion-ordered mapping with dot notation access

modules.name: attmap.pathex_attmap
documentation: Canonical behavior for attmap in pepkit projects

classes.name: attmap.pathex_attmap.PathExAttMap

methods.name: attmap.pathex_attmap.PathExAttMap.__getattr__
documentation:
Get attribute, accessing stored key-value pairs as needed.

:param str item: name of attribute/key
:param object default: value to return if requested attr/key is missing
:param bool expand: whether to attempt path expansion of string value
:return object: value bound to requested name
:raise AttributeError: if requested item is unavailable

methods.name: attmap.pathex_attmap.PathExAttMap.__getitem__
documentation:
Fetch the value of given key.

:param hashable item: key for which to fetch value
:param bool expand: whether to expand string value as path
:return object: value mapped to given key, if available
:raise KeyError: if the requested key is unmapped.

methods.name: attmap.pathex_attmap.PathExAttMap.items
documentation:
Produce list of key-value pairs, optionally expanding paths.

:param bool expand: whether to expand paths
:return Iterable[object]: stored key-value pairs, optionally expanded

methods.name: attmap.pathex_attmap.PathExAttMap.values
documentation:
Produce list of values, optionally expanding paths.

:param bool expand: whether to expand paths
:return Iterable[object]: stored values, optionally expanded

methods.name: attmap.pathex_attmap.PathExAttMap._data_for_repr
documentation:
Hook for extracting the data used in the object's text representation.

:param bool expand: whether to expand paths
:return Iterable[(hashable, object)]: collection of key-value pairs
    to include in object's text representation

methods.name: attmap.pathex_attmap.PathExAttMap.to_map
documentation:
Convert this instance to a dict.

:return dict[str, object]: this map's data, in a simpler container

methods.name: attmap.pathex_attmap.PathExAttMap.to_dict
documentation:
Return a builtin dict representation of this instance.

:return dict: builtin dict representation of this instance
Used in pepkit projects, with Mapping conversion and path expansion

modules.name: attmap.attmap_echo
documentation: AttMap that echoes an unset key/attr

classes.name: attmap.attmap_echo.EchoAttMap

methods.name: attmap.attmap_echo.EchoAttMap.__getattr__
documentation:
Fetch the value associated with the provided identifier.

```
param int | str item

identifier for value to fetch

param object default

default return value

param bool expand

whether to attempt variable expansion of string
value, in case it's a path

return object

whatever value corresponds to the requested key/item

raises AttributeError

if the requested item has not been set,
no default value is provided, and this instance is not configured
to return the requested key/item itself when it's missing; also,
if the requested item is unmapped and appears to be protected,
i.e. by flanking double underscores, then raise AttributeError
anyway. More specifically, respect attribute naming that appears
to be indicative of the intent of protection.
```

methods.name: attmap.attmap_echo.EchoAttMap._lower_type_bound
documentation: Most specific type to which an inserted value may be converted
An AttMap that returns key/attr if it has no set value.

modules.name: attmap
documentation: Package-scope definitions

modules.name: attmap.attmap
documentation: Dot notation support for Mappings.

classes.name: attmap.attmap.AttMap

methods.name: attmap.attmap.AttMap.__setitem__
documentation:
This is the key to making this a unique data type.

:param str key: name of the key/attribute for which to establish value
:param object value: value to which set the given key; if the value is
    a mapping-like object, other keys' values may be combined.

methods.name: attmap.attmap.AttMap._cmp
documentation: Hook to tailor value comparison in determination of map equality.

methods.name: attmap.attmap.AttMap._final_for_store
documentation:
Before storing a value, apply any desired transformation.

:param hashable k: key for which to store value
:param object v: value to potentially transform before storing
:return object: finalized value

methods.name: attmap.attmap.AttMap._metamorph_maplike
documentation:
Ensure a stored Mapping conforms with type expectation.

:param Mapping m: the mapping to which to apply type transformation
:return Mapping: a (perhaps more specialized) version of the given map
:raise TypeError: if the given value isn't a Mapping

methods.name: attmap.attmap.AttMap._new_empty_basic_map
documentation: Return the empty collection builder for Mapping type simplification.

methods.name: attmap.attmap.AttMap._repr_pretty_
documentation:
IPython display; https://ipython.readthedocs.io/en/stable/api/generated/IPython.lib.pretty.html

:param IPython.lib.pretty.PrettyPrinter p: printer instance
:param bool cycle: whether a cyclic reference is detected
:return str: text representation of the instance

A class to convert a nested mapping(s) into an object(s) with key-values
using object syntax (attmap.attribute) instead of getitem syntax
(attmap["key"]). This class recursively sets mappings to objects,
facilitating attribute traversal (e.g., attmap.attr.attr).

modules.name: attmap._att_map_like
documentation: The trait defining a multi-access data object

classes.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike.__init__
documentation:
Create a new instance, optionally with initial key-value pairs.

:param Mapping | Iterable[(Hashable, object)] entries: initial
    KV pairs to store

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike.add_entries
documentation:
Update this instance with provided key-value pairs.

:param Iterable[(object, object)] | Mapping | pandas.Series entries:
    collection of pairs of keys and values

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike.get_yaml_lines
documentation:
Get collection of lines that define YAML text rep. of this instance.

:param Iterable[(function(object) -> bool, object)] conversions:
    collection of pairs in which first component is predicate function
    and second is what to replace a value with if it satisfies the predicate
:return list[str]: YAML representation lines

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike.is_null
documentation:
Conjunction of presence in underlying mapping and value being None

:param object item: Key to check for presence and null value
:return bool: True iff the item is present and has null value

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike.non_null
documentation:
Conjunction of presence in underlying mapping and value not being None

:param object item: Key to check for presence and non-null value
:return bool: True iff the item is present and has non-null value

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike.to_map
documentation:
Convert this instance to a dict.

:return dict[str, object]: this map's data, in a simpler container

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike.to_dict
documentation:
Return a builtin dict representation of this instance.

:return dict: builtin dict representation of this instance

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike.to_yaml
documentation:
Get text for YAML representation.

:param bool trailing_newline: whether to add trailing newline
:return str: YAML text representation of this instance.

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike._data_for_repr
documentation:
Hook for extracting the data used in the object's text representation.

:return Iterable[(hashable, object)]: collection of key-value pairs
    to include in object's text representation

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike._excl_from_eq
documentation:
Hook for exclusion of particular value from a representation

:param hashable k: key to consider for omission
:return bool: whether the given key k should be omitted from comparison

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike._excl_from_repr
documentation:
Hook for exclusion of particular value from a representation

:param hashable k: key to consider for omission
:param type cls: data type on which to base the exclusion
:return bool: whether the given key k should be omitted from
    text representation

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike._excl_classes_from_todict
documentation: Hook for exclusion of particular class from a dict conversion

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike._lower_type_bound
documentation: Most specific type to which stored Mapping should be transformed

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike._new_empty_basic_map
documentation: Return the empty collection builder for Mapping type simplification.

methods.name: attmap._att_map_like.AttMapLike._simplify_keyvalue
documentation:
Simplify a collection of key-value pairs, "reducing" to simpler types.

:param Iterable[(object, object)] kvs: collection of key-value pairs
:param callable build: how to build an empty collection
:param Iterable acc: accumulating collection of simplified data
:return Iterable: collection of simplified data
Base class for multi-access-mode data objects.
